---
applyTo: ".github/prompts/**/*.prompt.md"
description: "Create reusable prompt files that are clear, scoped, and easy for managers to run."
---
# Prompt file authoring rules

- Each prompt file should solve one repeatable task.
- Put the outcome first.
- Reference supporting files with relative Markdown links instead of duplicating large guidance blocks.
- Ask for missing details only when they materially affect the output.
- Specify the expected output format.
- Keep prompts portable across teams.
- Avoid repo-internal jargon unless the glossary defines it.
- Prefer prompts that produce Markdown outputs that can be committed back into the repo.
